title: I Miss You, Hugs and Kisses
original_title: I Miss You, Hugs and Kisses
overview: Successful businessman Charles Kruschen (Donald Pilon) is accused of bludgeoning to death his beautiful but manipulative model wife Magdalene (Elke Sommer). As the trial draws to a close, Charles reflects on the events leading up to the terrible incident...
